creator: dave@dal.ca
text:
Any progress on this port? I noticed that for freebsd users it is necessary to compile the OpenCL application with -pthread in CFLAGS and CXXFLAGS (not the port itself but the application a user writes). Should this be mentioned in a pkg-message?

Seen here:
http://portablecl.org/docs/html/faq.html?highlight=freebsd
